description: CompositionBlack and blue checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, front buttoned placket with an inner black lining, short sleeves with fold over cuffs and an inner black lining, patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps, branding embroidered and appliquéd above the left pocket and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsProudly display your fashion sense with this checked shirt from locomotive. The short sleeves with fold over cuffs accentuate your well-toned arms, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that perfect casual look.Model statisticsThe product is a size L on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
